summary: Fixed auto-updater crash: when AssetUrl is empty (no assets attached to release), DownloadAndInstallAsync now throws a clear message instead of crashing with invalid URI. Also built and uploaded TelegramAutoDownload_v2.2.10_Portable.zip (64MB) to the v2.2.10 GitHub release so the auto-updater can now download it. Pushed fix commit 2506a93.
current_status: v2.2.10 release now has Portable ZIP attached. Auto-updater fixed to handle missing assets gracefully.
